zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Cherleton於1400年出生在英國威爾斯波斯時，她的父親Sir Edward Cherleton29歲，母親Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton30歲。她於1418年與Sir John Grey 1st Earl of Tankerville, 6th Lord of Powys在英國英格蘭藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1425年9月17日在英國英格蘭肯特武爾可姆享年25歲，埋葬在英國肯特武爾可姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Cherleton于1400年出生在英国威尔斯波斯时，她的父亲Sir Edward Cherleton29岁，母亲Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton30岁。她于1418年与Sir John Grey 1st Earl of Tankerville, 6th Lord of Powys在英国英格兰藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1425年9月17日在英国英格兰肯特武爾可姆享年25岁，埋葬在英国肯特武爾可姆。

nameMeanings.name: Cherleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Charlton
meanings: English (Northumberland and Durham): habitational name from North Charlton or Charlton near Bellingham (both Northumberland) or from any of the many other places so named (there are over ninety examples in England), from Old English Ceorlatūn ‘settlement (Old English tūn) of the peasants’. Old English ceorl denoted originally a free peasant of the lowest rank, later (but probably already before the Norman conquest) a tenant in pure villeinage, a serf or bondsman.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Cherleton was born in 1400, in Powys, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Edward Cherleton, was 29 and her mother, Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton, was 30. She married Sir John Grey 1st Earl of Tankerville, 6th Lord of Powys in 1418, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 17 September 1425, in Ulcombe, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 25, and was buried in Ulcombe, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Cherleton est née en 1400, à Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Edward Cherleton, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Grey 1st Earl of Tankerville, 6th Lord of Powys en 1418, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 17 septembre 1425, à Ulcombe, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 25 ans, et a été enterrée à Ulcombe, Kent, Angleterre.

Sie hat 1418 in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Sir John Grey 1st Earl of Tankerville, 6th Lord of Powys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 17. September 1425 im Alter von 25 Jahren in Ulcombe, Kent, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Ulcombe, Kent, England begraben.

Lei sposato Sir John Grey 1st Earl of Tankerville, 6th Lord of Powys nel 1418, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 17 settembre 1425, nel Ulcombe, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 25 anni, e fu sepolta a Ulcombe, Kent, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Cherleton(이)가 1400년 영국 웨일스 파우이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Edward Cherleton(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1418년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 Sir John Grey 1st Earl of Tankerville, 6th Lord of Powys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1425년 9월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 울코브에서 25세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 울코브에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir John Grey 1st Earl of Tankerville, 6th Lord of Powys em 1418, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 17 de setembro de 1425, em Ulcombe, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 25 anos, e foi sepultada em Ulcombe, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Cherleton родилась в 1400 г. в местности поуис, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Edward Cherleton было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Eleanor Holland, Countess March, countess salisbury, baroness chereton, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Grey 1st Earl of Tankerville, 6th Lord of Powys в 1418 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 17 сентября 1425 г. в местности улкомб, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 25 лет и была похоронена в местности улкомб, кэнт, Англия.

Se casó con Sir John Grey 1st Earl of Tankerville, 6th Lord of Powys en 1418, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 17 de septiembre de 1425, en Ulcombe, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 25 años, y fue sepultada en Ulcombe, Kent, Inglaterra.
